name: Benson Henderson
winProfile: 1 Elite+ wins, 4 Top-5+ wins, 9 ranked quality wins.
shortCase: Four UFC title-fight wins and elite lightweight depth, capped by close decisions, a low finish rate, and three prime losses.
bestArgument: Henderson pairs an 11-3 UFC record with three successful lightweight defenses and one of the deepest schedules in the division.
counterArgument: Several signature wins were razor-close, he rarely finished opponents, and the Pettis, dos Anjos, and Cerrone losses all occurred while he was elite. WEC is excluded.
whyRankedHere: Henderson pairs an 11-3 UFC record with three successful lightweight defenses and one of the deepest schedules in the division.
whyNotHigher: Several signature wins were razor-close, he rarely finished opponents, and the Pettis, dos Anjos, and Cerrone losses all occurred while he was elite. WEC is excluded.
finalTakeaway: Four UFC title-fight wins and elite lightweight depth, capped by close decisions, a low finish rate, and three prime losses.
